---
title: "Syllabus"
---

# Syllabus

## Course Information

**Course Title:** Structural Equation Modeling: Introduction 
**Instructor:** Pedro Cardoso-Leite  







## Course Schedule


### Chapter 1: Introduction to SEM

### Chapter 2: Descriptive Statistics

### Chapter 3: Probability Distributions

### Chapter 4: Simple Linear Regression

### Chapter 5: Multiple Linear Regression

### Chapter 6: Moderation and Mediation

### Chapter 7: Factor Analysis

### Chapter 8: Path Analysis

### Chapter 9: Structural Equation Modeling

### Chapter 10: Examples & Exercises



## Grading

- Participation & Exercises 25%
- Final Exam: 75%

## Required Materials

- R (latest version)
- RStudio (latest version)
- lavaan package
- Course materials available on this website

## Recommended Textbooks

see Resources
